name: Low-Fat Pastry
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the first three ingredients into a bowl.
2. Work together until crumbly.
3. Pour water all over top and mix with fork, then hands, until it will hold together.
4. Roll thinly. Makes enough for 2 crusts.
5. For a two-crust pie, cut through the top crust with a sharp knife while the pie is still hot.
WARNING: This recipe has been rewritten to avoid aggressive culinary slang and ensure clarity without altering the original ingredients or instructions.
